description_long: This object is a round, bulbous apricot with a slightly flattened base and a wide, open top, revealing a textured, earthy interior. The exterior is a warm, orange-brown color with visible seams and cracks, suggesting a weathered or aged surface. The rim is darker, almost grayish, and appears to be slightly raised and rougher than the rest of the body. Subtle horizontal striations encircle the upper portion, adding to its naturalistic appearance. The surface is matte and shows signs of wear, with some lighter patches and irregularities. No stem or leaf is visible, and the apricot is presented alone, without contact with other fruits.
description: A round, orange-brown apricot with a wide, open top and a weathered, cracked surface, featuring a darker rim and subtle horizontal striations.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the wide, open cavity and textured interior, with the dark rim clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the cracked surface, horizontal striations, and the transition from the dark rim to the lighter body.
description_view_2: Opposite side view emphasizing the roundness, surface cracks, and the subtle color variations across the apricot.
description_view_3: Angled view displaying the curvature, the open top, and the continuity of the striations and cracks around the body.
attribute_blemish_pattern: cracks, lighter patches, and surface irregularities
